title: Meta debuts first AI model from new Superintelligence group

title: Goldman Embraces ‘Picks and Shovels’ of AI With More Capex Ahead
description: Investors need exposure to semiconductor companies and other “picks and shovels” of artificial intelligence as spending accelerates, even with the Iran war stoking geopolitical tensions, according to Goldman Sachs Asset Management’s Brook Dane.

title: Meta's Muse Spark: A New AI Era Unveiled
description: Meta Platforms has launched Muse Spark, its inaugural artificial intelligence model from a dedicated superintelligence team. This move highlights Meta's commitment to compete in AI, aiming to leverage Muse Spark for everyday tasks and enhancing engagement with its vast user base on social media platforms.
content: Meta Platforms has revealed Muse Spark, marking the company's debut in artificial intelligence with this pioneering model. The initiative stems from a substantial investment in a superintelligence team, reflecting Meta's strategic efforts to bridge t... [614 chars]

content:

title: Marc Andreessen sketches AGI pricing for advanced AI systems like OpenClaw
description: Marc Andreessen has outlined a tiered pricing vision for artificial general intelligence (AGI). Paid LLMs such as Claude and OpenAI for open-source AI systems like OpenClaw become the cost differentiator.

title: DIAGNOS Provides an Update on Sales and Regulatory Activities for CARA
description: BROSSARD, Quebec, April 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Diagnos Inc. ('DIAGNOS” or the 'Corporation”) (TSX Venture: ADK, OTCQB: DGNOF, FWB: 4D4A), a company dedicated to the early detection of eye-related health using Artificial Intelligence (AI) techniques, is pleased to provide an update to the press release dated January 13, 2026 on the regulatory pathway for the future version of its flagship product CARA, which incorporates eye-related disease detection algorithms, and April 1, 2026 announcement regarding U.S. establishment registration renewal and the continued U.S. commercialization status of the legacy version of CARA.

title: The Philippines in the AI loop
description: WE have been watching the Philippine outsourcing industry evolve. From voice support to shared services and now into something far more interesting. What we are seeing today is not just another upgrade. It is a shift where value is created. If we play this right, the Philippines can become a key player in one of the most important layers of artificial intelligence: quality assurance.

title: Citigroup says AI helps speed account openings and systems upgrades
description: Citigroup is using artificial intelligence to speed up ‌account openings and the retirement of old software, the U.S. bank's head of technology, Tim Ryan, said, as the firm pushes to improve productivity.
content:
